aboutText: Developer focused on building efficient digital solutions and optimizing the systems that support them. My profile combines software development with solid knowledge in hardware architecture and technical maintenance, always ensuring the best performance of equipment and applications. I have an intermediate technical English level, ideal for documentation analysis and problem-solving.
experienceFreelanceDescription: School and personal projects focused on developing integral skills in web and mobile programming.
experienceSanyulnetDescription: Responsible for the technical and digital services area: hardware diagnostics and repair on phones, screens, printers, and electronics. Managed cyber services, facilitating administrative tasks, printing projects, and creative work, providing immediate technical support to users.
projectBytemanaDesc: Integrated system for inventory and resource management in mini-markets.
projectDensoraDesc: Intelligent dental management platform that eliminates administrative chaos. Ecosystem composed of a Flutter Mobile App, a Web Portal in Astro and React, and a Python Chatbot for managing appointments via WhatsApp. All backed by Google Firebase.
projectTekkureDesc: Technical support, IT services, and custom software development. Solutions focused on solving technological needs and optimizing digital management.
